title: Nvidia is sending GPUs to the moon | TechCrunch
summary: Lunar Outpost , a startup building robotics for space infrastructure, announced on Thursday that its next moon rover will use Jetson chips to control its lidar system. When you purchase through links in our articles, we may earn a small commission .
